\tzpentry{ID5727}{Sing Quantum State Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5727 introduces Sing Quantum State Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Psi_{\mathrm{sing}}(\mathbf{x},t) \propto \delta^{(2)}(\mathbf{x} \in \Sigma_{\mathrm{TZP}})\, \mathrm{e}^{\mathrm{i}\theta(\mathbf{x},t)}, \end{equation}
